title: Marsh Property
meta_description: Complete brand identity and digital presence for Marsh Property — a boutique real estate agency operating across Melbourne's inner suburbs.
challenge: The brandscape for residential real estate in Australia is crowded with safe, interchangeable identities. Marsh Property needed to stand apart from generic aesthetics without losing the trust signals that buyers and sellers expect — professionalism, local expertise, and clarity.
solution: The M-arch motif — structural, architectural, immediately ownable — formed the foundation of the identity. A restrained teal-green palette and confident typography signal premium without pretension. The system scales across signage, digital, print, and social while staying unmistakably Marsh.
impact: A cohesive brand and digital experience that reads as boutique and trustworthy — built to scale as the agency grows across Melbourne's inner suburbs.
